extortion.description: Smiles By Steedman, a family and general dentistry practice in Lake Stevens, Washington! We are dedicated to providing you and your family with the personalized, affordable and comfortable care that you deserve. Through every step of the dental process, we will work and consult with you to ensure that you achieve a healthier oral state in your timeframe and on your budget.- Patients' personal information- documents and medical histories- Company network database- Financial documents- Other information etc.  https://www.smilesbysteedman.com/
